Description

How To Create A Website using React JS with Vite
32Likes
7,596Views
Jan 12026
#HTML #CSS #reactjs #webdesign (COMPLETELY FOR BEGINNERS ONLY ) In this video, we’ll build a website using React JS with Vite from scratch. You’ll learn how to set up a React project using Vite, understand the project structure, and start building components to create a modern, fast, and scalable website. This tutorial is ideal for beginners who want a faster alternative to Create React App and for developers who want to understand how React + Vite works in real projects.
